word: G603 - ἀποκαραδοκία - apokaradokía - ap-ok-ar-ad-ok-ee'-ah - Earnest expectation

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine / பெயர்ச்சொல் (பெண்பால்)
to look forth from one's post
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G575 and a compound of κάρα kara (the head) and G1380 (in the sense of watching); intense anticipation: - earnest expectation.
